projects.title: Boeing 757 Prototype CAD Design
projects.description: Developed a conceptual Boeing 757 prototype model in Onshape as a 3D CAD design project. The model includes major aircraft components such as the fuselage, wings, tail section, engines and landing gear. This project demonstrates CAD modelling, digital prototyping and design visualization skills in creating a detailed aircraft concept.

projects.title: EV Car 3D CAD Design
projects.description: Designed a compact electric vehicle (EV) 3D CAD model using SolidWorks. The project includes exterior body modelling, wheel design, windshield, side mirrors, front detailing and overall vehicle form development. This work demonstrates skills in automotive CAD modelling, surface/form development, product visualization and digital design presentation.

projects.title: Rover Robot CAD Model
projects.description: A 3D CAD model of an explorer robot rover developed in Onshape, featuring a rugged four-wheel system, articulated suspension arms, mechanical joints and a compact chassis. The design highlights my skills in robotic mechanism modelling, CAD assembly development, and concept based product design for mobile robotic applications.

projects.title: Modern Lamp Set Design
projects.description: 3D CAD design of a modern lamp set created in Onshape, featuring a cylindrical lamp body and mounting base for decorative and functional lighting applications.

projects.title: Custom Electronics Suitcase Enclosure Design
projects.description: Custom suitcase style enclosure designed in SolidWorks with internal space and layout features for installing electrical circuits, batteries and related electronic components.

projects.title: Wind Powered EV Parking Station Design
projects.description: Designed a renewable energy based electric vehicle parking station concept with integrated wind turbines to support EV charging. The design includes a covered parking structure, multiple vehicle bays, structural supports and wind turbine units for sustainable power generation. This project demonstrates concept development, 3D CAD modelling, renewable energy integration and sustainable transportation infrastructure design.

projects.title: Solar Power Plant 3D CAD Design
projects.description: Designed a solar power plant concept using Onshape, including solar panel arrays, utility buildings, water storage/treatment units, pipe structures and supporting site elements. The project demonstrates 3D CAD modelling, renewable energy infrastructure design, site layout development and concept visualization for sustainable power generation systems.

projects.title: Water Tank and Piping System 3D CAD Design
projects.description: Designed a 3D CAD model of a water storage and piping system, including an elevated water tank, pipe network, valves, gauges, pump unit and supporting steel frame. The project demonstrates mechanical piping layout development, component arrangement, product visualization and practical CAD modelling skills for utility and water supply system applications.

projects.title: Venom Head 3D CAD Design
projects.description: Designed a detailed 3D CAD model of a Venom inspired character head, focusing on the distinctive facial form, large eye contours, open mouth geometry and sharp teeth detailing. This project demonstrates character based 3D modelling skills, surface shaping and creative digital design for concept visualization.

projects.title: Wrist Watch 3D CAD Design
projects.description: Designed a detailed 3D CAD model of a wrist watch, including the watch case, dial, hour markers, hands, strap, buckle and side detailing. The project focuses on product design, accurate component modelling, surface finishing and realistic digital visualization for a wearable accessory concept.
